message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant TaskExecutionStrategy as "TaskExecutionStrategy"
participant Action as "Action"
participant Connection as "Connection"
participant SSH client/server connection as "SSH client/server connection"
participant ssh daemon (or winrm service) as "ssh daemon (or winrm service)"

TaskExecutionStrategy->>Action: init(..)
Action->>Action: init(..)
Action->>Action: run()
Action->>Connection: put_file()
Connection->>SSH client/server connection: transfer module data
SSH client/server connection->>ssh daemon (or winrm service): save module to disk
ssh daemon (or winrm service)--<Connection: transfer complete
Connection->>Action: return remote path
Action->>Connection: exec_command()
Connection->>ssh daemon (or winrm service): run module remotely
ssh daemon (or winrm service)--<Connection: execute shell command
ssh daemon (or winrm service)--<Connection: return response code, stdout, stderr
Connection->>Action: return response code, stdout, stderr
Action->>TaskExecutionStrategy: return JSON
TaskExecutionStrategy--<Action: return JSON

@enduml
